metadata.title: LaneFindingItem — delegated finding from the Assisted Remediation Lane

description: A single blackboard entry delegated to the Assisted Remediation Lane. Returned in LaneFindingListResponse.findings and as the base class for LaneFindingWithBundle. The id is the blackboard_entry UUID; payload carries the raw AuditFinding payload. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class LaneFindingItem.

id.description: UUID of the blackboard_entries row for this delegated finding.

subject.description: Blackboard subject string — typically an audit violation subject (e.g. 'audit.violation::rule_id').

payload.description: The raw blackboard entry payload. Shape conforms to AuditFinding.json (finding fields: rule_id, severity, subject, evidence).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the blackboard entry was created.
